nasb.text: then your heart will become proud and you will forget the Lord your God who brought you out from the land of Egypt, out of the house of slavery.

esv.text: then your heart be lifted up, and you forget the Lord your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of slavery,

cnv.text: 那時，你就心高氣傲，忘記了耶和華你的　神，就是把你從埃及地，從為奴之家領出來的那一位。

ccb.text: 切勿心骄气傲，忘记你们的上帝耶和华。祂把你们从受奴役之地——埃及救出来，
